title_summary: Aggregate failure: validate query parameter handling (12/12 scenario checks failed)
description: The validate-query-parameter-handling check failed in aggregate against http://localhost:8899: [api-tester-validate-query-parameter-handling] quality outcome=FAIL; metric=0.0. The per-scenario evidence is in TestCases/validate-query-parameter-handling/cases.json. There is no single reproducible API call — reproduce it with the script described in the steps below (which is also why this bug has no Postman section).
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Start the target API at http://localhost:8899.
2. Write a script that calls GET http://localhost:8899/products with valid (limit=5&skip=5&select=title,price), boundary (limit=0, limit=-1, limit=99999) and unknown (foo=bar) query parameters.
3. Assert documented handling per case: valid params honored, invalid rejected or defaulted per docs, unknown params ignored.
4. Compare your script's failures with the per-scenario evidence in TestCases/validate-query-parameter-handling/cases.json — this run recorded 12 of 12 checks failing.
expected_result: Per the documentation (references/dummyjson-com/dummyjson-com-docs.md:27 — https://dummyjson.com/docs): "All the resources can be used with query params to achieve pagination and get limited data. `limit=0` clears the limit and you get all items." Every 'validate query parameter handling' scenario check must conform to this.

documentation.text: All the resources can be used with query params to achieve pagination and get limited data. `limit=0` clears the limit and you get all items
documentation.reviewer_reason: The documentation in dummyjson-com-docs.md states that query parameters should be usable for pagination and data limiting, with limit=0 returning all items. The observed test result shows all 12 query parameter handling validation checks failed (metric=0.0), indicating the API is not functioning as documented.

documented_expected: Per the documentation (references/dummyjson-com/dummyjson-com-docs.md:27 — https://dummyjson.com/docs): "All the resources can be used with query params to achieve pagination and get limited data. `limit=0` clears the limit and you get all items."
